channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st June
item.description:
The constant stream of dumped rubbish continues in this location. Why does the council allow this to happen time and time again? This is the 4th fly tip this week!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Alstone Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st June
item.description:
Window has graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramble Chase, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 21st June
item.description:
pothole - 45 cm wide deeper than tennis ball no damage to vehicle
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st June
item.description:
Looks to be graffiti on the window after some tape

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Footpath Unusable, 21st June
item.description:
Public footpath completely blocked with overgrown vegetation. What 3 words: halt.cubed.cutaway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frog Furlong Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surfaces breaking up, kerb not repaired, barries damaged and scattered, 21st June
item.description:
Outside Lynworth Exchange

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Flytipping, 21st June
item.description:
Bags of waste Mattress Carpet. Time to install cameras and make the residents take their rubbish to the tip like everyone else?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public footpath blocked off, 20th June
item.description:
There is a barrier blocking the public footpath (presumably placed there by the landowner). Behind the barrier the path is heavily overgrown and almost completely impassable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timbercombe Lane, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead treee, 20th June
item.description:
Tree is dead and Is a hazard in strong winds to property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunstan Glen, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neglected area, 20th June
item.description:
The whole area is neglected tree limbs are hanging down to ground level growing out from the bottom of trees. Drains around 18 bedford avenue before and after are nearly closed. A drain outside the school gate is broken and cars parking on pavements at the T junction of Bedford avenue and alstone Lane is making it dangerous to come out of Bedford avenue onto alstone Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Bedford Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose drain cover is keeping us awake at night. This happens every few months. Can you please find a permanent solution. Thank you., 20th June
item.description:
Opposite the main entrance to Spirax Sarco HQ by the traffic island near the wall to Langton Place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Langton Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 13 Insley Gardens, 20th June
item.description:
Car has been say stationary unmoved now for nearly 6 weeks, parked away from the curb and is causing issues with access
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Insley Gardens, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole around water meter appeared within 24 hour period.Also hole in road appeared which neighbours filled with rubble, 20th June
item.description:
Pavement hole is outside no 10 Pitt Mill Gardens, Hucclecote GL3 3ND. Hole in road outside no 9. Could they be connected. Pavement hole appeared within 24 hours 19th June. Hole in road appeared 2 weeks previously.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pitt Mill Gardens, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden Pallet, 20th June
item.description:
Dumped around 0120am , side camera caught it being left but didnt pick out anyone as they out of shot

item.title: No streetlights working for the full stretch of road and hence the cycle path and bus stop are pitch black and dangerous, 20th June
item.description:
A435 between The Hyde lane traffic lights and the roundabout at the north entrance to GE
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches impeding pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Some branches of the tree directly outside 24 Keynsham Road are now so long that pedestrians need to duck under them as they walk past the tree - there's barely 1.5m clearance from the pavement to the lowest branches

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Keynsham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Impaired visibility, 19th June
item.description:
The verge on the right hand side as you reach the chicane travelling from Gotherington. Visibility is impaired. The verges have been cut but not very well because drivers reaching the chicane going southwards still can’t see because the grass was cut in sufficient area .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
